lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior is heavily worn with torn upholstery and missing trim. The engine and transmission require major repairs.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This vehicle is in truly impeccable condition, looking and performing just as beautifully as the day it was first driven. It has been meticulously maintained and kept in showroom-quality shape, with a flawless exterior and a pristine interior that still feels brand new. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is it!

This vehicle is in fair condition and has served as a dependable daily driver, though it shows clear signs of its age and mileage. The exterior features several noticeable scratches and a minor dent on the rear bumper, and the clear coat is beginning to thin on the hood. Mechanically, the car starts and runs, but the engine idle is slightly rough and the brakes will likely need servicing in the near future. Inside, the cabin is intact but the upholstery on the driver's seat is worn, and there are some persistent stains on the carpeting. All major electronics, including the air conditioning and radio, are fully functional. This is a solid option for a buyer seeking a functional vehicle at a lower price point who is willing to invest in some cosmetic and mechanical upkeep.

This vehicle is in fair condition, having served as a reliable daily driver for several years. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches on the passenger side doors and a few small dings on the rear bumper. The paint on the hood has begun to show some minor oxidation. Inside, the upholstery is intact but displays moderate wear on the driver's seat bolster, and there is a small stain on the rear carpet. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, though the air conditioning is not as cold as it once was and the tires will likely need replacement within the next 5,000 miles. It is a solid choice for someone looking for dependable transport who isn't concerned with cosmetic perfection.
The car is in good condition. The exterior has minor scratches and the interior shows light wear. All mechanical systems are functioning correctly and the vehicle has been regularly maintained.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, the unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous operational standards. Offering a harmonious balance of performance and long-term value, this vehicle stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible prior ownership. We invite you to secure a sophisticated driving experience with this exceptional addition to our curated inventory.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. It runs great and looks fantastic, just looking for a new home where it'll be appreciated! Perfect for someone who wants a dependable car without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering high-revving performance through six individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. Paired with a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox, the drivetrain remains crisp with definitive engagement and a short-throw feel. The chassis benefits from proactive rear subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry utilizing Bilstein dampers for improved damping rates. While showing honest patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity is robust, featuring a tight M Variable Differential Lock and linear power
Reliable used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for sale.

We present this exceptional value as a testament to our commitment to automotive excellence and long-term owner satisfaction.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable, stylish ride that’s ready for the road? I’m parting with my car, and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really nice shape, runs like a dream, and has been well-cared for over the years. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a weekend getaway, this beauty will get you there comfortably. Come by and take it for a test drive—I think you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 inline-six powerplant paired with a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanical maintenance is current, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and proactive rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity. The chassis remains taut with refreshed bushings and factory-spec dampers, maintaining the sharp turn-in and lateral stability the M-division is known for. With individual throttle bodies providing immediate induction response and a mechanical limited-slip differential ensuring optimal power delivery, this vehicle offers a visceral, analog driving experience in a well-maintained package.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean title. Fully operational.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily practicality. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery is well-preserved, and all electronic features—including the navigation system and climate control—operate exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and scheduled service. The engine delivers smooth power, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the suspension provides a comfortable, quiet ride. With tires showing plenty of remaining tread and a recently serviced braking system, this car is ready for the road with no immediate maintenance required. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical reliability and aesthetic appeal. Having undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection by our certified technicians, this automobile stands as a testament to consistent care and quality engineering. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, representing an outstanding acquisition for the discerning professional seeking both value and performance.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Demonstrating refined aesthetic appeal and robust mechanical integrity, this model has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking a dependable and sophisticated automotive investment.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape—super reliable and still looks great on the road. It’s got a few tiny signs of love here and there, but it runs like a dream and is totally ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for a dependable car that’s been well-cared for, this is the one for you!

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and practicality, having been well-maintained as a reliable daily driver. The exterior finish retains a high gloss, showing only minor road-wear consistent with its history, while the alloy wheels remain in excellent shape. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, featuring supportive seating with minimal bolster wear and a fully functional suite of electronics, including a responsive infotainment system and powerful climate control. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision; it has recently undergone a full multi-point inspection, fresh oil service, and a brake check to ensure it's ready for the road. With a quiet cabin and a suspension that handles city bumps and highway speeds with equal grace, this car offers a premium driving experience for its next owner. Complete service records are available to demonstrate its consistent upkeep.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies reliability and performance. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced combination of luxury and durability, it represents an exceptional value for the discerning driver who demands quality without compromise.
